goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'leicester' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should 'arrive by 13:00'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'primavera'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to leicester and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on wednesday and should arrive by 13:00
Make sure you get travel time and price
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called primavera
Make sure you get phone number
